comment: Corrupt — an EarthQuaker Devices Data Corrupter style monophonic harmonizing PLL synth-fuzz. Tracks the input pitch, regenerates it as a square-wave master oscillator, divides that into subharmonic octaves, and adds an FM-modulated (vibrato) harmony voice. Glitchy octave-jumping on ambiguous pitch is part of the character. Best on single-note lines. Desktop preview implements the full DSP; pedal C port is staged (audio_nop smoke build).
gid_comment: 0x03 = Drive category (synth-fuzz). NOTE: on MS-70CDR, custom Drive effects may need a stock Drive installed to appear in the on-device browser.
fxid_comment: 0x01C6 = above the repo's used range, distinct from microloom(450)/flower(451)/shatter(452)/arrakis(453). Verify uniqueness before flashing.

params.name: Master
params.comment: Master oscillator octave: 0 = unison, 50 = -1 oct, 100 = -2 oct (the Master Oscillator toggle).

params.name: Sub
params.comment: Subharmonic voice level (a square one octave below the master).

params.name: Rate
params.comment: Frequency-modulation (vibrato) rate on the harmony voice (~0.5..12 Hz).

params.name: Depth
params.comment: FM vibrato depth (0..3 semitones). High = seasick warble.

audio_nop_comment: Pedal C port starts as a UI-only smoke build. Full DSP validated on desktop first; see tools/audio_preview/renderers/corrupt.py.
